description: Tools for the core booking engine covering all item types (trips, hotels, transport, guides). These are the unified booking management endpoints. The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these to create multi-item holds, list user bookings, and handle cancellations.

tools.name: create_booking
tools.description: Create a new booking with a 15-minute hold for one or more items (TRIP, HOTEL, TRANSPORT, GUIDE). The booking enters HOLD status pending payment. Use this unified endpoint for multi-item bookings. Returns a booking reference for user-facing display.

metadata.description: Type-specific data (e.g., check-in/check-out dates, guest count, pickup location)

guest_email.description: Required if booking as a guest (not authenticated)

tools.returns: Booking with id, reference, status (HOLD), total_price_usd, hold_expires_at (15 minutes)

tools.name: list_bookings
tools.description: List all bookings for the authenticated user, filterable by status. Use to show the user their upcoming, past, or cancelled bookings, or to check if they have an existing booking for a specific trip.

status.description: Filter bookings by lifecycle status (default: all)

tools.returns: Paginated list of BookingSummary objects with id, reference, type, status, total_price_usd, payment_status

tools.name: get_booking_detail
tools.description: Get full details of a specific booking including all items, pricing, hold expiry, and cancellation info. Use to answer user questions about a specific booking.
tools.returns: Full Booking object with items array (item_type, name, unit_price_usd, total_price_usd), hold_expires_at, refund details

tools.name: cancel_booking
tools.description: Cancel an existing booking. Refund amount depends on the cancellation policy of the booked item(s) and time before the trip. Always confirm with the user before calling this — cancellation may be irreversible.

tools.name: get_booking_qr
tools.description: Get the QR code for a confirmed booking. Use when the user needs their booking QR code for check-in at a hotel, tour meeting point, or transport pickup.
